CDAllAtOnceDeployment.^description: This CodeDeploy deployment group uses the AllAtOnce deployment configuration. AllAtOnce deploys to all instances simultaneously — if the deployment fails, the entire fleet is affected. Use Canary or Linear deployment configurations to reduce blast radius.
CDAllAtOnceDeployment.shortDesc: Use Canary or Linear deployment config instead of AllAtOnce

CDAutoRollbackDisabled.^description: Automatic rollback is not enabled for this deployment group. Without auto-rollback, failed deployments require manual intervention to restore the previous version, increasing MTTR and potential downtime.

CDNoAlarms.^description: No CloudWatch alarms are configured for this deployment group. Alarm-based automatic rollback can stop deployments and roll back when monitored metrics breach thresholds, providing an additional safety net beyond deployment health checks.

CDNoLoadBalancer.^description: No load balancer is associated with this deployment group. Without a load balancer, CodeDeploy cannot perform in-place traffic shifting during deployments, meaning instances serve traffic while being updated which can cause errors for end users.
CDNoLoadBalancer.shortDesc: Associate load balancer with CodeDeploy group
